title: OpenStack nova
description: Configuration for the Nova compute service (OpenStack-Helm nova, release 2025.1). Only the fields here are settable on a Composition; everything else uses the chart defaults in values.yaml. Deploy all the OpenStack component blueprints into one namespace to form a complete install.

virt_type.title: Virtualization type
virt_type.description: qemu = software emulation (no /dev/kvm needed); kvm = hardware acceleration.
